sections.label: Introduction
sections.instruction: Introduce yourself with impact. This is the first thing visitors see.

fields.name: role
fields.label: Your Role
fields.instruction: Your title or what you specialize in.

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: Tagline
fields.instruction: One sentence that captures your essence.
fields.placeholder: I craft digital experiences that leave a mark.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Bio
fields.instruction: 2-3 sentences about yourself, your background, and what makes you unique.
fields.placeholder: I'm a developer with a passion for building elegant, high-performance web applications. With years of experience working across the full stack, I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful interfaces.

fields.name: openToWork
fields.label: Open to Work
fields.instruction: Shows an availability badge in the navbar.

fields.name: resumeLink
fields.label: Resume
fields.instruction: Upload your resume as a PDF (max 5MB).

sections.label: Projects
sections.instruction: Showcase your best work. Add 2 to 6 projects.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.instruction: What does it do and what problem does it solve?
fields.placeholder: A web app that lets users create stunning portfolios by filling a simple form...

fields.name: stack
fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.instruction: Type a technology and press Enter to add.

fields.name: images
fields.label: Project Screenshot
fields.instruction: Upload one screenshot or banner image for this project.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Type a skill and press Enter to add.
